form: Belair Direct Car Insurance Quote - 1 Car, 1 Driver (Quebec)

steps.title: Vehicle Information
steps.description: What would you do without your car? Let us protect it! Quote for residents of the province of Quebec.
steps.promotional_banner: Get up to 10% discount — Complete your online quote and save.

questions.question: Year
questions.related_info: Select the year your vehicle was manufactured.
questions.question_information: Select the year your vehicle was manufactured. You can find this on your vehicle ownership documents or proof of insurance card.

questions.question: Make
questions.related_info: Select the make (brand) of your vehicle.
questions.question_information: You can find the vehicle make on the rear exterior of most cars, on your proof of insurance card (pink slip), or in your vehicle ownership documents. Or, simply provide your VIN instead.

questions.question: Model
questions.related_info: Select the model of your vehicle.
questions.question_information: Select the model of your vehicle. You can also find your vehicle using the VIN (Vehicle Identification Number) for a quick and precise quote.

alternative_input.label: Find your car with the VIN
alternative_input.description: For a quick and precise quote

alternative_step.title: Enter your Serial Number or VIN

questions.question: Serial Number or VIN
questions.related_info: Enter your Vehicle Identification Number for a quick and precise quote.
questions.question_information: You can find the serial or vehicle identification number (VIN) on your registration certificate, in your vehicle ownership documents, on your proof of insurance card (pink slip), on your dashboard or in the left door of your car.

steps.title: Vehicle Details
steps.description: This information will help us customize your coverage.

questions.question: Do you use your vehicle to commute to work or school?
questions.related_info: Indicates whether the vehicle is used for regular commuting purposes.
questions.question_information: Accurate commute details are required to help us better understand your daily driving habits. This information is secure and will not be shared with any third party.

commute_calculator.title: Most frequent commute
commute_calculator.description: Accurate commute details are required to help us better understand your daily driving habits. This information is secure and will not be shared with any third party.

questions.question: Yearly kilometres
questions.related_info: Estimated total number of kilometres you expect to drive in a year.
questions.question_information: Enter the kilometres you drive yearly, including your daily commute and road trips for vacation. You don't have to be exact. Just an approximation will do.

questions.question: Condition of the car when you got it
questions.related_info: The condition of the vehicle at the time you acquired it affects the type of coverage available.
questions.question_information: A dealership uses a demo car for test drives or to showcase its features to customers. They have fewer kilometres on the odometer and are less expensive than buying a brand new car.

questions.question: Anti-theft system?
questions.related_info: You could save more if your car has an anti-theft system.
questions.question_information:
You could save more if your car has an anti-theft system.

Engraved parts: A unique code is engraved on main vehicle parts after purchase to easily identify the car if it has been stolen.

Satellite monitoring system: This system is connected to a central surveillance station and helps track a stolen car using GPS or mobile networks.

tooltip_sections.title: Engraved parts
tooltip_sections.description: A unique code is engraved on main vehicle parts after purchase to easily identify the car if it has been stolen.

tooltip_sections.title: Satellite monitoring system
tooltip_sections.description: This system is connected to a central surveillance station and helps track a stolen car using GPS or mobile networks.

steps.promotional_info: Insure more than one car and you could save 15%

steps.title: Driver Information
steps.description: Your age could unlock a discount! Start by entering the details of the registered owner of the vehicle.

questions.question: First name
questions.related_info: As it appears on your driver's licence.
questions.question_information: Enter your first name exactly as it appears on your driver's licence.
questions.validation: First name is required to continue.

questions.question: Last name
questions.related_info: As it appears on your driver's licence.
questions.question_information: Enter your last name exactly as it appears on your driver's licence.

questions.question: Gender identity
questions.related_info: As it appears under the Sex listed on your driver's licence.
questions.question_information:
In order to provide an accurate quote, we need to know the gender identity of the individual being insured — as it appears under the Sex listed on their driver's licence.

Gender X acknowledges all identities including but not limited to trans, non-binary, two-spirit, and binary people.

We're committed to ensuring people of all genders and identities feel safe, welcome, and respected.

questions.question: Date of birth
questions.related_info: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age and determine applicable discounts and pricing.
questions.question_information: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age and determine applicable discounts and pricing.

questions.question: Age when you got your first driver's licence
questions.related_info: The age at which you first received a driver's licence affects your driving experience rating.
questions.question_information: Can't remember how old you were when you got your first driver's licence? Don't worry! An approximate age will do.

questions.question: Number of years with current insurer
questions.related_info: The number of continuous years you have been insured with your current insurer.
questions.question_information: If you were not covered by a car insurance policy for six months or more, this is considered a lapse in coverage.

conditional_message.message: Exclusive savings: In celebration of your insurance history, you could be eligible to unlock a lower price.

steps.title: Contact Details
steps.description: A few contact details to save and send your quote.

questions.question: Email address
questions.related_info: We will only use your email to save or send you a copy of your quote.
questions.question_information: We will only use your email address to save or send you a copy of your quote.

questions.question: Phone type
questions.related_info: Select the type of phone number: Mobile, Home, or Work.
questions.question_information: Select the type of phone number you are providing so we can best reach you.

questions.question: Phone number
questions.related_info: Enter your phone number in the format 555-000-0000.
questions.question_information: Enter your phone number. Format: 555-000-0000.

questions.question: Postal code
questions.related_info: Your postal code helps us calculate your rate accurately. Format: A1A 1A1.
questions.question_information: Your postal code is used to calculate location-based risk factors for your premium. Format: A1A 1A1.

questions.question: Number of years living at this address
questions.related_info: Select how long you have lived at your current address.
questions.question_information: Select the range that best describes how long you have lived at your current address.

questions.question: Are you a member of an eligible employee group, alumni association, or other organization?
questions.related_info: Group membership may qualify you for an additional discount. Group membership may be verified.
questions.question_information: If you are an employee or alumni of a partner organization, you may qualify for an additional group discount. Enter the name of your employer or association.

questions.question: Are you a university graduate?
questions.related_info: A university degree may qualify you for an education discount.
questions.question_information: Unlock a discount if you have a bachelor's, master's or doctorate degree.

steps.title: Review & Submit
steps.description: Please review and agree to the following before getting your price.

questions.question: Do you agree to the Terms of Use and use of personal information?
questions.related_info: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and use of personal information as per the Privacy Promise. I understand that the total estimated price provided is not a guaranteed amount.
questions.question_information: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and use of personal information as per the Privacy Promise. I understand that the total estimated price provided is not a guaranteed amount.
questions.agreementText: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and use of personal information as per the Privacy Promise. I understand that the total estimated price provided is not a guaranteed amount.

questions.question: Do you give belairdirect permission to contact you about its products and services?
questions.related_info: I give belairdirect permission to contact me about its products and services by email, by phone or via other means. I am aware that I may withdraw my consent at any time.
questions.question_information: I give belairdirect permission to contact me about its products and services by email, by phone or via other means. I am aware that I may withdraw my consent at any time.
questions.agreementText: I give belairdirect permission to contact me about its products and services by email, by phone or via other means. I am aware that I may withdraw my consent at any time.

questions.question: Do you consent to a soft credit check to potentially save up to 25%?
questions.related_info: A soft credit check provides a basic overview of your credit report without impacting your score. With this information, your price will reflect our best offer and you could save up to 25% on your car insurance.
questions.question_information:
A soft credit check provides a basic overview of your credit report without impacting your score. With this information, your price will reflect our best offer and you could save up to 25% on your car insurance with a soft credit check.

By selecting Yes, you agree that belairdirect may collect and use your credit information from consumer reporting agencies. If you become a customer, this information will be updated periodically to determine your future price (insurance premium) and any potential savings.

For more information, visit the Insurance Bureau of Canada's guide: All about credit information and insurance.
questions.agreementText: Save up to 25% on all eligible products, without affecting your credit score in any way. Stay in control knowing you can opt out at any time. Don't worry, we'll check your score periodically to help ensure you receive the best price.

price_page.title: Your quote is ready
price_page.disclaimer: The initial estimated prices displayed on this page are based on the summary information you provided, certain assumptions and preselected values (e.g. certain discounts for which you may be eligible) and are subject to change. When you complete your quote, we will provide a final price based on your unique situation and options for coverage and discounts, if applicable and subject to eligibility criteria.
price_page.validity_note: Price valid for 60 days from the date of this quote.

coverage_items.name: Third party property damage protection
coverage_items.detail: Section A: Civil Liability. Covered up to $1,000,000.

coverage_items.name: Extra damage protection
coverage_items.detail: Coverage applies to perils other than Collision or Upset. Deductible: $250.

coverage_items.name: Accidental death benefits insurance
coverage_items.detail: Coverage for accidental death resulting from a vehicle accident.
